---
title: "Function Grapher"
description: "Free online function grapher. Type a math formula like sin(x) or x^2 and see it plotted instantly with adjustable axes. Runs entirely in your browser."
toc: false
show-reading-time: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700&family=PT+Sans:wght@400;700&display=swap');
body { font-family: 'PT Sans', sans-serif; }
h1, h2, h3, h4 { font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; }

.graph-container {
  max-width: 900px;
}

.graph-container label {
  display: block;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-top: 16px;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
  font-size: 14px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  color: #555;
}

.func-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.func-row input {
  flex: 1;
  padding: 10px 14px;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
  border: 1.5px solid #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 8px;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  transition: border-color 0.2s;
}

.func-row input:focus {
  outline: none;
  border-color: #2c7be5;
}

.func-row .color-dot {
  width: 14px;
  height: 14px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.func-row button {
  padding: 6px 10px;
  font-size: 16px;
  border: 1.5px solid #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #fafafa;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  line-height: 1;
}

.func-row button:hover {
  border-color: #cc0000;
  background: #fff5f5;
}



.graph-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-top: 12px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.graph-actions button {
  padding: 8px 16px;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  border: 1.5px solid #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #fafafa;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.2s;
}

.graph-actions button:hover {
  border-color: #2c7be5;
  background: #eef5ff;
}

#graph-plot {
  margin-top: 20px;
  border: 1.5px solid #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 12px;
  overflow: hidden;
  min-height: 400px;
}

.slider-controls {
  margin-top: 12px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 8px;
}

.slider-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
}

.slider-label {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #555;
  width: 55px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.3px;
}

.slider-row input[type="range"] {
  flex: 1;
  height: 6px;
  accent-color: #4682B4;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.zoom-btn {
  width: 28px;
  height: 28px;
  border: 1.5px solid #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: #fafafa;
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: bold;
  cursor: pointer;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  transition: all 0.2s;
}

.zoom-btn:hover {
  border-color: #4682B4;
  background: #eef5ff;
}

.graph-error {
  margin-top: 8px;
  padding: 8px 12px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: #fff5f5;
  border: 1px solid #ffcccc;
  color: #cc0000;
  font-size: 13px;
  display: none;
}

.graph-error.visible {
  display: block;
}

.examples-hint {
  margin-top: 8px;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #888;
}
</style>

<p>Type a math formula and see it graphed instantly. Supports <code>x^2</code>, <code>sin(x)</code>, <code>sqrt(x)</code>, <code>log(x)</code>, <code>abs(x)</code>, <code>e^x</code>, <code>pi*x</code>, and more. Everything runs in your browser.</p>

<div class="graph-container">

<label>Functions</label>
<div id="func-list">
  <div class="func-row" data-index="0">
    <span class="color-dot" style="background:#4682B4;"></span>
    <input type="text" value="x^2" placeholder="e.g. sin(x), x^3 - 2*x" />
    <button class="remove-btn" title="Remove">&times;</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="graph-actions">
  <button id="btn-add">+ Add function</button>
  <button id="btn-clear">Clear all</button>
</div>



<p class="examples-hint">Try: <code>sin(x)</code> &middot; <code>x^3 - 3*x</code> &middot; <code>exp(-x^2)</code> &middot; <code>1/x</code> &middot; <code>tan(x)</code> &middot; <code>log(x)</code> &middot; <code>sin(pi*x)</code></p>

<div class="graph-error" id="graph-error"></div>

<div id="graph-plot"></div>

<div class="slider-controls">
  <div class="slider-row">
    <span class="slider-label">x range</span>
    <button class="zoom-btn" id="x-out">−</button>
    <input type="range" id="x-zoom" min="1" max="100" value="50" />
    <button class="zoom-btn" id="x-in">+</button>
  </div>
  <div class="slider-row">
    <span class="slider-label">y range</span>
    <button class="zoom-btn" id="y-out">−</button>
    <input type="range" id="y-zoom" min="1" max="100" value="50" />
    <button class="zoom-btn" id="y-in">+</button>
  </div>
</div>

</div>

<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mathjs@11/lib/browser/math.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/function-plot@1/dist/function-plot.js"></script>

<script>
(function() {
  const COLORS = ['#4682B4', '#CC0000', '#2E8B57', '#CC7000', '#6A0DAD', '#DAA520', '#008B8B', '#DC143C'];
  let funcIndex = 1;

  const funcList = document.getElementById('func-list');
  const errorEl = document.getElementById('graph-error');
  const plotEl = document.getElementById('graph-plot');

  function getRows() {
    return funcList.querySelectorAll('.func-row');
  }

  function addRow(value) {
    var idx = funcIndex++;
    var color = COLORS[idx % COLORS.length];
    var row = document.createElement('div');
    row.className = 'func-row';
    row.dataset.index = idx;
    row.innerHTML = '<span class="color-dot" style="background:' + color + ';"></span>' +
      '<input type="text" value="' + (value || '') + '" placeholder="e.g. sin(x), x^3 - 2*x" />' +
      '<button class="remove-btn" title="Remove">&times;</button>';
    funcList.appendChild(row);
    row.querySelector('input').focus();
    render();
  }

  function removeRow(row) {
    if (getRows().length <= 1) {
      row.querySelector('input').value = '';
    } else {
      row.remove();
    }
    render();
  }

  // Detect any single-letter variable (not x) and replace with x for plotting
  function normalizeVar(expr) {
    // Known function names and constants to exclude
    var reserved = ['sin','cos','tan','asin','acos','atan','sqrt','log','ln','exp','abs','ceil','floor','round','pi','e','x'];
    // Find all single lowercase letters used as identifiers
    var matches = expr.match(/\b([a-z])\b/g);
    if (!matches) return {expr: expr, varName: null};
    // Filter out reserved
    var vars = [];
    for (var i = 0; i < matches.length; i++) {
      if (reserved.indexOf(matches[i]) === -1 && vars.indexOf(matches[i]) === -1) {
        vars.push(matches[i]);
      }
    }
    // If there's exactly one non-x variable, replace it with x
    if (vars.length === 1 && vars[0] !== 'x') {
      var v = vars[0];
      // Replace the variable with x (word boundary)
      return {expr: expr.replace(new RegExp('\\b' + v + '\\b', 'g'), 'x'), varName: v};
    }
    return {expr: expr, varName: null};
  }

  function render() {
    errorEl.classList.remove('visible');
    errorEl.textContent = '';

    // Auto-detect sensible x-range based on the expressions
    var allExprs = [];
    var rows2 = getRows();
    for (var j = 0; j < rows2.length; j++) {
      var e = rows2[j].querySelector('input').value.trim();
      if (e) allExprs.push(normalizeVar(e));
    }
    var joined = allExprs.join(' ');
    var xMin = -10, xMax = 10;
    // If expression contains ln(1-x) or log(1-x), domain is likely (0,1)
    if ((joined.indexOf('ln(1-x)') !== -1 || joined.indexOf('log(1-x)') !== -1) && joined.indexOf('ln(x)') !== -1) {
      xMin = 0.01; xMax = 0.99;
    } else if (joined.indexOf('ln(x)') !== -1 || joined.indexOf('log(x)') !== -1 || joined.indexOf('sqrt(x)') !== -1) {
      xMin = 0.01; xMax = 10;
    } else if (joined.indexOf('1/x') !== -1) {
      xMin = -10; xMax = 10;
    }

    var data = [];
    var detectedVar = null;
    var rows = getRows();
    for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
      var expr = rows[i].querySelector('input').value.trim();
      if (!expr) continue;
      // Auto-detect variable: find single-letter vars that aren't math functions
      var result = normalizeVar(expr);
      var plotExpr = result.expr.replace(/\bpi\b/g, "PI").replace(/\be\^\(([^)]+)\)/g, "exp($1)").replace(/\be\^([a-zA-Z0-9]+)/g, "exp($1)");
      if (result.varName) detectedVar = result.varName;
      var color = COLORS[i % COLORS.length];
      rows[i].querySelector('.color-dot').style.background = color;
      data.push({
        fn: plotExpr,
        color: color,
        attr: { 'stroke-width': 3 }
      });
    }

    if (data.length === 0) {
      plotEl.innerHTML = '';
      return;
    }

    try {
      // Sample the first function to auto-detect y range
      var yMin = Infinity, yMax = -Infinity;
      try {
        var mathScope = { pi: Math.PI, e: Math.E };
        var step = (xMax - xMin) / 200;
        for (var s = xMin + step; s < xMax - step; s += step) {
          for (var d = 0; d < data.length; d++) {
            try {
              var node = math.parse(data[d].fn);
              var compiled = node.compile();
              mathScope.x = s;
              var val = compiled.evaluate(mathScope);
              if (isFinite(val)) {
                if (val < yMin) yMin = val;
                if (val > yMax) yMax = val;
              }
            } catch(e2) {}
          }
        }
      } catch(e3) {}
      // Add padding
      if (!isFinite(yMin) || !isFinite(yMax)) { yMin = -10; yMax = 10; }
      var yPad = (yMax - yMin) * 0.1 || 1;
      yMin -= yPad; yMax += yPad;

      // Detect variable name for x-axis label
      var axisLabel = detectedVar || 'x';

      functionPlot({
        target: '#graph-plot',
        width: plotEl.clientWidth || 800,
        height: 420,
        xAxis: { domain: [xMin, xMax], label: axisLabel },
        yAxis: { domain: [yMin, yMax], label: 'f(' + axisLabel + ')' },
        grid: true,
        tip: { xLine: true, yLine: true },
        data: data
      });
      // Save base ranges for slider zoom
      baseXRange = [xMin, xMax];
      baseYRange = [yMin, yMax];
      xZoomSlider.value = 50;
      yZoomSlider.value = 50;
    } catch (e) {
      errorEl.textContent = e.message || 'Invalid expression';
      errorEl.classList.add('visible');
    }
  }

  // Event: input changes
  funcList.addEventListener('input', render);

  // Event: remove button
  funcList.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
    if (e.target.classList.contains('remove-btn')) {
      removeRow(e.target.closest('.func-row'));
    }
  });

  // Event: add button
  document.getElementById('btn-add').addEventListener('click', function() {
    addRow('');
  });

  // Event: clear
  document.getElementById('btn-clear').addEventListener('click', function() {
    var rows = getRows();
    for (var i = rows.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
      if (i === 0) {
        rows[i].querySelector('input').value = '';
      } else {
        rows[i].remove();
      }
    }
    render();
  });



  // Slider zoom controls
  var xZoomSlider = document.getElementById('x-zoom');
  var yZoomSlider = document.getElementById('y-zoom');
  var baseXRange = null;
  var baseYRange = null;

  function applyZoom() {
    if (!baseXRange || !baseYRange) return;
    var xFactor = Math.pow(10, (xZoomSlider.value - 50) / 25);
    var yFactor = Math.pow(10, (yZoomSlider.value - 50) / 25);
    var xCenter = (baseXRange[0] + baseXRange[1]) / 2;
    var yCenter = (baseYRange[0] + baseYRange[1]) / 2;
    var xHalf = (baseXRange[1] - baseXRange[0]) / 2 / xFactor;
    var yHalf = (baseYRange[1] - baseYRange[0]) / 2 / yFactor;

    try {
      var rows3 = getRows();
      var data2 = [];
      var detVar = null;
      for (var i = 0; i < rows3.length; i++) {
        var ex = rows3[i].querySelector('input').value.trim();
        if (!ex) continue;
        var res = normalizeVar(ex);
        if (res.varName) detVar = res.varName;
        data2.push({ fn: res.expr, color: COLORS[i % COLORS.length], attr: { 'stroke-width': 3 } });
      }
      if (data2.length === 0) return;
      functionPlot({
        target: '#graph-plot',
        width: plotEl.clientWidth || 800,
        height: 420,
        xAxis: { domain: [xCenter - xHalf, xCenter + xHalf], label: detVar || 'x' },
        yAxis: { domain: [yCenter - yHalf, yCenter + yHalf] },
        grid: true,
        tip: { xLine: true, yLine: true },
        data: data2
      });
    } catch(e) {}
  }

  xZoomSlider.addEventListener('input', applyZoom);
  yZoomSlider.addEventListener('input', applyZoom);

  document.getElementById('x-in').addEventListener('click', function() {
    xZoomSlider.value = Math.min(100, parseInt(xZoomSlider.value) + 5);
    applyZoom();
  });
  document.getElementById('x-out').addEventListener('click', function() {
    xZoomSlider.value = Math.max(1, parseInt(xZoomSlider.value) - 5);
    applyZoom();
  });
  document.getElementById('y-in').addEventListener('click', function() {
    yZoomSlider.value = Math.min(100, parseInt(yZoomSlider.value) + 5);
    applyZoom();
  });
  document.getElementById('y-out').addEventListener('click', function() {
    yZoomSlider.value = Math.max(1, parseInt(yZoomSlider.value) - 5);
    applyZoom();
  });

  // Initial render
  setTimeout(render, 100);

  // Resize
  window.addEventListener('resize', function() {
    clearTimeout(window._graphResize);
    window._graphResize = setTimeout(render, 200);
  });
})();
</script>
```
